name: Design Auditor
description_en: Audit designs against 19 rules across Figma files and code (HTML/CSS/React/Vue/Tailwind)—accessibility, contrast, tokens, responsiveness, dark patterns, and Nielsen heuristics.
description_zh: 按 19 条规则审查 Figma 与代码(HTML/CSS/React/Vue/Tailwind)中的设计——可访问性、对比度、设计令牌、响应式、暗黑模式与 Nielsen 启发式。
long_en: Auto-detects framework and design system (MUI, Chakra, shadcn/ui, Ant, Radix, Bootstrap), flags color-blindness risk, and outputs before/after diffs and developer handoff reports in English and Korean.
long_zh: 自动识别框架与设计系统(MUI、Chakra、shadcn/ui、Ant、Radix、Bootstrap),提示色盲风险,输出前后差异对比与开发交接报告(支持英语与韩语)。
sec_note_en: Reads your design and code files to produce reports; no changes are applied without your action.
sec_note_zh: 读取你的设计与代码文件以生成报告;未经你操作不会改动文件。
